policy_hits.description: Health or wellness claim likely requiring substantiation.

evidence.text: Our clinically proven supplement helps you lose 20 pounds and melts fat.

policy_hits.recommended_action: Remove or qualify the claim and provide substantiation.

policy_hits.description: Weight-loss and body-image claims can trigger platform and FTC review.

evidence.text: Our clinically proven supplement helps you lose 20 pounds and melts fat.

policy_hits.recommended_action: Avoid absolute body or fat-loss language and route for review.

policy_hits.description: Before-and-after framing can imply atypical guaranteed results.

evidence.text: Are you overweight? See a before and after transformation

policy_hits.recommended_action: Add context, substantiation, and typical-results disclosure.

policy_hits.description: Meta ads should not imply knowledge of a viewer's health, body, or medical condition.

evidence.text: Are you overweight? See a before and after transformation

policy_hits.recommended_action: Reframe the ad around the product or service benefit without implying personal health attributes.

policy_hits.description: Meta health and appearance ads can be rejected for unrealistic results or negative self-perception framing.

evidence.text: Are you overweight? See a before and after transformation
Our clinically proven supplement helps you lose 20 pounds and melts fat.

policy_hits.recommended_action: Avoid transformation framing and use qualified wellness-support language.

recommended_actions: Remove or qualify the claim and provide substantiation.
Avoid absolute body or fat-loss language and route for review.
Reframe the ad around the product or service benefit without implying personal health attributes.
Avoid transformation framing and use qualified wellness-support language.
Add context, substantiation, and typical-results disclosure.

safer_rewrites.body: Our developed with evidence-informed guidance supplement helps you lose 20 pounds and melts fat. Results vary.
safer_rewrites.headline: Are you overweight? See a before and after transformation

safer_rewrites.body: Designed to complement healthy habits. Individual results vary.
safer_rewrites.headline: Support your wellness routine with daily nutrition
